name: ACES (Advanced Crew Escape Suit)
best_known_for: The orange "pumpkin" suit worn for every Space Shuttle launch and re-entry after Challenger
credit: Full-pressure launch-entry suit developed by David Clark after the Challenger loss made shirtsleeve ascent unacceptable. Replaced the earlier Launch Entry Suit (LES). Detachable gloves, parachute harness integrated, distinctive international-orange colour for water-recovery visibility.

links.l: David Clark Co · ACES product page
